The terms * are also available at https://curl.se/docs/copyright.html. * * You may opt to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute and/or sell * copies of the Software, and permit persons to whom the Software is * furnished to do so, under the terms of the COPYING file. * * This software is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY * KIND, either express or implied. * * SPDX-License-Identifier: curl * ***************************************************************************/
/* The last 3 #include files should be in this order */

function.name: Curl_setstropt
Curl_setblobopt
setstropt_userpwd
protocol2num

unit.comment: /* * Do not make Curl_vsetopt() static: it is called from * packages/OS400/ccsidcurl.c. */

function.name: Curl_vsetopt

unit.comment: /* * curl_easy_setopt() is the external interface for setting options on an * easy handle. * * NOTE: This is one of few API functions that are allowed to be called from * within a callback. */

function.name: curl_easy_setopt
